name: Shirshal
identity: Investigative magical-law center of House Shirsh.
inside: Cases, magical anomalies, and private investigations drive civic motion.

canonical_identity.identity: Investigative magical-law center of House Shirsh.
canonical_identity.inside: Cases, magical anomalies, and private investigations drive civic motion.

sensory_surface.detail: Cases, magical anomalies, and private investigations drive civic motion.

public_behavior_texture: People who belong here are usually investigators, magistrates, arcane specialists, and public conduct is read through expectations such as cooperate with inquiries.
visible_power_signals: Ordinary decisions are visibly shaped by Magi Magistratus.
local_tension_surface: The place feels stable only until pressures such as magical law violations begin showing through daily routines.
differentiator: Shirshal stands apart because its economy leans on investigation, magical research; public faith remains visible through secondary to investigative mandate; outsiders are noticed fastest when they resemble illicit magical actors.
encounter_rhythm: Most first scenes in Shirshal begin through magical investigation hub rhythms: arrival, observation, minor correction, and only then deeper access.
scene_openers: A first arrival at Shirshal immediately highlights investigative magical-law center of house shirsh
The quickest social read of Shirshal comes from how locals react to cooperate with inquiries.
social_misstep_examples: Treating Shirshal like a casual stop rather than a governed space.
Ignoring local expectation to cooperate with inquiries.
low_grade_conflict_triggers: A queue, toll, or inspection dispute tied to investigation.
A local intermediary resents outsider assumptions about Shirshal.
institutional_escalation_path: Workshop or neighborhood correction in Shirshal
Escalation into law, tariff, or faction attention if ignored
outsider_advantage: Outsiders can sometimes notice pressure fractures in Shirshal before residents admit them.
outsider_liability: Outsiders in Shirshal are judged quickly by whether they understand its governing rhythms.
public_complication_table: A minor official wants paperwork clarified.
A public argument exposes pressure around magical law violations.
Someone mistakes the party for agents tied to Magi Magistratus.
A delay at a gate, quay, shrine, or market creates heat.
A small errand reveals a larger local imbalance.
private_pressure_table: A household or guild contact is quietly overextended.
A local fixer asks for help with a contained problem.
A hidden cost behind investigation surfaces.
A trusted intermediary is being watched.
A faith, law, or trade obligation has slipped.
A personal favor could become a faction debt.

arrival_variants_by_time.dawn: At dawn, Shirshal feels procedural and watchful as daily rhythms set.
arrival_variants_by_time.midday: By midday, Shirshal is busiest and least forgiving of confusion.
arrival_variants_by_time.night: At night, Shirshal reveals who really moves after formal structures thin out.

recent_local_change_signal: Locals in Shirshal mention that something small but important has changed in the last few weeks, even if they refuse to name it directly.
